_comment: Portable slice of ~/.claude/settings.json. install.sh MERGES these keys into the live file (creating it if absent) and leaves every other key alone. Keys starting with _ are stripped, not merged. Deliberately excluded: enabledPlugins + extraKnownMarketplaces (scripts/install-plugins.sh owns those, from plugins.yaml) and skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt (per-machine consent, not config).
_comment_statusline: $HOME, never /root — the same file is read by claude on the macOS host AND inside the container, where $HOME is /root. A hardcoded /root path renders nothing on the host. gsd-statusline.js needs compiled libs that install-claude-config.sh builds; without that build it throws Cannot find module and the whole chain renders empty.
_comment_statusline_glob: The r() helper globs the plugin version segment so a plugin update does not silently blank the chain — pinning caveman/0d95a81d35a9 or ponytail/4.8.4 leaves a dangling path the moment either updates. ls -dt | head -1 picks the newest by mtime when several versions are cached; a no-match glob renders nothing rather than erroring; the trailing : keeps the exit code 0 so a missing plugin never fails the whole status line. gsd runs first because it is the only one that consumes the stdin payload.

statusLine.command: r(){ p=$(ls -dt $1 2>/dev/null|head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && bash "$p"; :; }; node "$HOME/.claude/skills/gsd-core/hooks/gsd-statusline.js"; printf " | "; r "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/caveman/caveman/*/src/hooks/caveman-statusline.sh"; printf " "; r "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/ponytail/ponytail/*/hooks/ponytail-statusline.sh"
